allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\)[:2000] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\),str\) else ''\) for l in lines[-5:] if l]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['xlsx','excel','sheet','xls']\)]")
